kernel_subject: bvec: add memcpy_{from,to}_bvec and memzero_bvec helper
stage1_reason: All 5 commits involve kernel API changes: bio_alloc/bio_init signature changes, removal of genhd.h header, and replacement of manual copy logic with memcpy_to/from_bvec helpers.
stage2_reason: Driver commits bd3d3203eb84 and b3bd0a8a74ab directly use memcpy_to/from_bvec helpers introduced in kernel commit f93a181af40b, which matches the driver migration's stated API changes.
